title: EQ - Tap on button to change presets, blurred screen
scenario: EQ preset picker dialog shows blurred background screen when selecting Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ settings
steps: 2. Navigate to Home screen and select the connected Poly device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Tap the picker button to change EQ presets (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
expected: The EQ preset picker dialog opens, and the background screen remains clear and unobstructed.
